scope.summary: Reconciles Cluster C: all janitor children C1..C6 are closed and no additional repo-disk janitor work remains for this cluster.
out_of_scope: Any additional janitor or cleanup work outside cluster C (workstreams A/B/D/E/G/F, release-plane tasks, or live-Oracle operations).

entry_points.name: Cluster C child closure status
entry_points.trace: br show oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.4 --json reported dependents 4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4, 4.5, 4.6 all with status=closed.

Close reasons identify committed sources/evidence: 72258581.../008ff... for 4.2 (evidence close JSON exists), e664fa0c... for 4.3 (evidence close JSON exists), d2fa643c... for 4.5 (evidence close JSON exists), 0cdc76a2... for 4.6 (evidence close JSON exists).

limitations: No live-Oracle or disk-janitor command output was rerun in this reconciliation close; this bead is a tracker/leaf-completion close against existing committed child close evidence and git history.
